title: Iran Retaliates After US and Israel Attack
description: The US and Israel began striking targets across Iran, with President Donald Trump urging Iranians to overthrow the government. The Islamic Republic responded by targeting US bases and interests across the region. (Source: Bloomberg)
content: The US and Israel began striking targets across Iran, with President Donald Trump urging Iranians to overthrow the government. The Islamic Republic responded by targeting US bases and interests across the region. (Source: Bloomberg)
